addBlacklist(address).details: Adds an asset to the blacklist, preventing its use in the protocolBlacklisted assets cannot be used as borrow or collateral assets

constructor.details: Initializes the ArchController with the contract deployer as the initial owner

getBlacklistedAssets(uint256,uint256).details: Returns paginated list of blacklisted assets

returns.arr: Array of token addresses in the specified range

getBlacklistedAssetsCount().details: Returns total number of blacklisted assets

getRegisteredBorrowers().details: Returns all registered borrowersUse paginated version for large lists to avoid gas limits

getRegisteredBorrowers(uint256,uint256).details: Returns a paginated list of registered borrowersUseful for building UIs that need to paginate through large lists

returns.arr: Array of borrower addresses in the specified range

getRegisteredBorrowersCount().details: Returns total number of registered borrowers

getRegisteredControllerFactories(uint256.details: Returns paginated list of registered controller factories

returns.arr: Array of factory addresses in the specified range

getRegisteredControllerFactoriesCount().details: Returns total number of registered controller factories

getRegisteredControllers(uint256,uint256.details: Returns paginated list of registered controllers

returns.arr: Array of controller addresses in the specified range

getRegisteredControllersCount().details: Returns total number of registered controllers

getRegisteredMarkets().details: Returns all registered markets (use paginated version for large lists)

getRegisteredMarkets(uint256,uint256).details: Returns paginated list of registered markets

returns.arr: Array of market addresses in the specified range

getRegisteredMarketsCount().details: Returns total number of registered markets

isBlacklistedAsset(address).details: Checks if an asset is blacklisted

isRegisteredBorrower(address).details: Checks if an address is a registered borrower

isRegisteredController(address).details: Checks if an address is a registered controller

isRegisteredControllerFactory(address).details: Checks if an address is a registered controller factory

isRegisteredMarket(address).details: Checks if a market is registered

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

registerBorrower(address).details: Adds a new borrower to the approved listBorrowers must be registered before they can deploy lending markets

params.borrower: Address to register as a borrower

registerController(address).details: Registers a controller contract (only callable by a registered factory)Controllers are privileged contracts that can register lending markets

registerControllerFactory(address).details: Registers a factory that can deploy protocol controllersThis self-registration pattern allows factories to register themselves      while maintaining security through ownership check

params.factory: Address of factory contract to register

registerMarket(address).details: Registers a lending market (only callable by a registered controller)Registration is performed by the factory after market deployment

params.market: Address of lending market to register

removeBlacklist(address).details: Removes an asset from the blacklist

removeBorrower(address).details: Removes a borrower from the approved listRemoved borrowers cannot deploy new markets but existing markets remain operational

removeController(address).details: Removes a controller from the registry

removeControllerFactory(address).details: Removes a controller factory from the registry

removeMarket(address).details: Removes a lending market from the registryUseful for cleaning up after market closure

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addBlacklist(address).notice: Only callable by the contract owner

registerBorrower(address).notice: Only callable by the contract owner

registerController(address).notice: This creates the controller role that can register markets

registerControllerFactory(address).notice: Can be called by owner OR by the factory itself if not already registered

registerMarket(address).notice: Markets must be registered before they can participate in the protocol

removeBlacklist(address).notice: Only callable by the contract owner

removeBorrower(address).notice: Only callable by the contract owner

removeController(address).notice: Only callable by the contract owner

removeControllerFactory(address).notice: Only callable by the contract owner

removeMarket(address).notice: Only callable by the contract owner
